eval: Transfer-arena masked charge schedule + phase timeline (A8.1, A8.5(i))
daily_cap_note: recorded, not enforced by the per-trip machinery: the cap binds only at >= 4 peak-rate crossings/day; adding a cap mechanism would be new method (A1.2). Known small understatement, stated.
p1_p3_identity: P1 and P3 charge the SAME masked schedule; the real ladders are identical at introduction and permanent return, so per-period P1:P3 credit ratios equal the real ratios exactly (TRANSFER_MASKING_NOTE property).
derivation_rule: 1. SOURCE: real pre-trial charge ladder for the cordon (time-of-day steps + daily cap), institutional record, held harness-side only (never in this repo).
2. COLLAPSE: hour-weighted mean of the ladder over each masked period's hours (world.tolling.period_for_hour) - canonical A6 collapse, no volume data, small understatement stated.

3. MASK: real currency -> credits via per-period factors = (arena-1 M4 credits-per-dollar factors, A6 rehearsal derivation) / (pre-trial-year annual-mean exchange rate, central-bank official series); a credit carries the same real value as in arena 1 up to the mask perturbation - the property that makes the frozen VoT scale (2.2238, never re-fit) a genuine cross-arena prediction.
4. PERTURB: +/-10% per period, deterministic CRN draws under keys 'bt2:charge_mask:{period}' (A1.4). Cap masked by the pm_peak factor (the period of the ladder maximum).

phase_timeline.compression: 10 sim days per real calendar month (uniform across phases)
phase_timeline.window_derivation: scored windows follow the truth series' period definitions (calendar spans only): P1 stabilized reading excludes the first two trial months; P2 residual is a whole-off-year reading; P3 is the first post-return calendar-year reading. Implementation constants in evaluation/transfer_protocol.py, owner-reviewed pre-firing (A8.1).
phase_timeline.day_convention: 0-indexed loop global days (day 0 = first simulated day), bounds inclusive

level_matching_scope: P0 matching restricted to demand/capacity constants; VoT 2.2238, logit theta, say-do 2.5, habit threshold/band, gate parameters NEVER touched (TRANSFER_MASKING_NOTE, A8.5(i)).
label: METHOD-TRANSFER
